seo.description: Alexey Perov — open source Unity editor tools, apps, and utilities on GitHub.

props.title: List of projects in Github account
paragraphs: All projects are of MIT or BSD-3-Clause licenses. Feel free to use them, report issues, and contribute.

props.heading: Unity3D Editor Tools
props.subheading: This tools aim to help to maintain assets in Unity projects. They help to find redundant assets, missing references, issues in settings and usages etc

cards.title: Dependency Hunter
cards.description: Dependency Hunter is a tool which finds and/or deletes unreferenced assets in Unity project.

cards.title: Missing References Hunter
cards.description: Missing References Hunter is a tool that finds all missing references in your project. Reads contents of assets to detect whether GUIDs they contain exist within the project.

cards.title: Textures Hunter
cards.description: Texture Hunter is a tool that provides summary of all textures and atlases in Unity project

cards.title: Lite Editor Coroutines
cards.description: This is an alternative version of Unity Editor Coroutines.

cards.title: Pocket Editor Coroutines
cards.description: This is a simplified version of Unity Editor Coroutines.

cards.title: UPM Template Creator
cards.description: This is a simple Go console app to simplify process of UPM Editor plugins creation & editing.

props.heading: Apps
props.subheading: Apps here are mostly related to .NET, Node.js, and Flutter

cards.title: Flutter Log Keeper (iOS/Android/Web/Dart Server)
cards.description: LogKeeper is a tool for storing logs that generates links to them after saving. Our applications automatically upload logs to it when errors are detected, and the resulting links are easier to share and attach to tasks than when using log files. It is made with Flutter using Bloc pattern and Firebase Firestore. It also demonstrates the usage of Dart on the backend and sharing code within a server and a client.

cards.title: Proviso
cards.description: Proviso is a complete set of Flutter tools for conditional rendering (if-else and switch conditions), subtree wrapping with a parent widget, and some handy shortcuts (like DebugWidget, WebOnlyWidget, SafeBuilder, and many more). Published on https://pub.dev/packages/proviso

cards.title: Router.NET
cards.description: Router.NET is .NET Core AWS Lambda application with DynamoDB and MongoDB storage implementations. Can be used for routing your apps towards different servers.

cards.title: FireShift
cards.description: Fireshift is a Flutter + Nest.js AWS Lambda + mongoDB (Mongoose) tool for getting user feedback

cards.title: Flutter Notes Manager
cards.description: Notes is a simple notes management app built with Flutter (iOS/Android/Web). It is based on Async-Redux (https://pub.dev/packages/async_redux) and Firebase Firestore.

cards.title: Notes Jetpack Compose
cards.description: NotesCompose is an implementation of Flutter Notes using Kotlin and JetPack Compose

cards.title: Log Keeper JetPack Compose
cards.description: LogKeeperCompose is an implementation of Flutter LogKeeper using Kotlin and JetPack Compose

cards.title: LogKeeper SwiftUI
cards.description: LogKeeper SwiftUI is a client of Flutter LogKeeper for an iOS built with SwiftUI, Redux, Swinject, SPM and Firestore.

props.heading: Various Tools
props.subheading: Some tools to simplify everyday development tasks.

cards.title: A Flutter App that helps in resizing textures
cards.description: This app helps to resize textures for crunch format support.

cards.title: A Slack App that unfurls monday.com links
cards.description: A Slack app built for AWS Lambda.

cards.title: Pulse Auto ID Generator WebHook for monday.com task manager
cards.description: monday.com lacks a feature of custom pulse id generation (see community feature request). Until the functionality is implemented, we use this WebHook tool based on Firebase, AWS Lambda and Node.js
